height="80" width="240" x="280" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rv_creator" parent="readview_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#FFB300;align=left;" value="<b>m_creator_trx_id</b><br>= 1004<br><i>创建此ReadView的事务ID</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>m_ids[] (活跃事务ID列表，创建快照时所有未提交的事务)</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="520" x="30" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rv_id1" parent="readview_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;" value="trx_id=1001<br>(未提交)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="30" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rv_id2" parent="readview_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;" value="trx_id=1002<br>(未提交)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="150" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rv_id3" parent="readview_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;" value="trx_id=1003<br>(未提交)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" 1004(当前事务)不在m_ids中<br>1005及以上都是创建快照后开始的事务</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="330" x="400" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rules_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#E65100;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>可见性判断规则 (trx_id 为行数据上的 DB_TRX_ID)</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="760" x="20" y="380" m_up_limit_id<br>↓<br><b>可见</b> (事务在快照前已提交)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="165" x="25" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rule2" parent="rules_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;align=center;" value="<b>规则2</b><br>trx_id &gt;= m_low_limit_id<br>↓<br><b>不可见</b> (事务在快照后开始)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="165" x="210" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rule3" parent="rules_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;align=center;" trx_id < m_up_limit_id
↓
